---
pagetitle: "Press | Jubayer Hossain"
title: "Press"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
callout-icon: false
---

:::  panel-tabset

# Newspaper 
1. Parental lack of antibiotic knowledge imperils child health in Bangladesh: Study. *The Business Standard* (08 February, 2024, 12:00 pm). <https://www.tbsnews.net/bangladesh/health/parental-lack-antibiotic-knowledge-imperils-child-health-bangladesh-study-789250>

2. What the rise in self-medication tells us about the country’s healthcare system. *The Business Standard* (27 May, 2024, 11:30 am). <https://www.tbsnews.net/features/panorama/what-rise-self-medication-tells-us-about-countrys-healthcare-system-861146>

:::
